chunks.title: Accession and Reign of Ahaziah
chunks.reason: Describes the rise of Ahaziah to the throne following his brothers' death and characterizes his wicked reign.

chunks.title: The Downfall of Ahaziah
chunks.reason: Narrates the king's fatal journey to Jezreel and his subsequent execution by Jehu.

chunks.title: Athaliah's Reign and Joash's Hiding
chunks.reason: Details Athaliah's attempt to destroy the royal line and the secret preservation of Joash.
